TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y1 one-minute spontaneous speech; source EAF: my life_dremedreman 1 min.eaf; anonymized speaker label: dremedreman

S.FORM: e nu pi e tua ta kakudan a semicuayan, vaquan
au, ay a nia kinazuanan angata, imaza i timung
mavan a ku, mavan a sinipualjak tjanuaken izua.
au pai kemasi kakedrian aken sinikiljivak aken aravac nia kina kati kama.
ata macidjilj aken a vavayan kaumaya
au e seman e inika manu seman pazangal
e mavan a za a ta macidilj aken a vavayan au masepatj a ku vetjek a uqauqaljay
e madrusa tjavulung, mate madrusa tjaljaljak tjanuaken.
sika nu kinemenemen itjen, tjala aken a sinan
e sinikiljivak aravac na nia kinacemekeljan
nu kinem nu lemadenga timaimanga namatazua
au pai, e ti kina kati kama
a a tulu tjanuaken pai a kemasi kakedrian.
